description:
Under `packages/pi-om-extension/docs/mastra-parity-backlog.md` → Practical backlog summary Tier 1 temporal reasoning overhaul.

Add tests that simulate multi-day sessions so stale relative references, long pauses, resumed work, and future planned changes remain chronologically correct and do not collapse into present-tense facts.
title: Add multi-day temporal regressions for stale references, elapsed gaps, and future state changes
